TextView.android:text:
Hydration Tips

1. Drink 8 Glasses a Day
Aim for at least 2 liters of water daily.

2. Start Your Morning with Water
Drink a glass of water right after waking up.

3. Carry a Water Bottle
Keep a bottle with you to sip throughout the day.

4. Eat Water-Rich Foods
Foods like cucumber and watermelon help hydration.

5. Drink Before Meals
A glass of water before eating aids digestion.

6. Limit Sugary Drinks
Replace sodas and juices with plain water.

7. Hydrate During Exercise
Drink water before, during, and after workouts.

8. Set Reminders
Use your phone to remind you to drink water.

9. Drink Herbal Teas
Caffeine-free teas count toward your fluid intake.

10. Track Your Intake
Use an app or journal to monitor daily water consumption.
